name: Agarose Gel Electrophoresis

components.name: 2. 微波加热至完全溶解 (注意防沸)
4. 倒入胶板，插梳，室温凝固 20–30 min
5. 样品与 6× Loading Dye 混合 (5:1)

notes.en: TAE is better for large fragments and gel extraction (low ionic strength, easier to cut bands); TBE provides higher resolution for small fragments (<1 kb). EtBr is carcinogenic — use GelRed/SYBR Safe alternatives. Running buffer and gel buffer must match. Avoid air bubbles. RNA gels require formaldehyde denaturing agarose.
notes.zh: TAE 适合大片段和胶回收 (低离子强度，跑得慢易切胶)；TBE 分辨率更高适合小片段 (<1 kb)。EtBr 致癌，推荐用 GelRed/SYBR Safe 等替代品。电泳缓冲液和制胶缓冲液须一致。避免气泡。RNA 胶需用甲醛变性凝胶。

ref: Sambrook & Russell (2001) Molecular Cloning, 3rd ed.; Lee et al. (2012) J Vis Exp 62:e3923
